item.title: So many of us can’t stop scrolling and most of us don’t understand why… To help understand why, I’m joined by two experts who break down exactly what short-form content is doing to our brains. Dr Aditi Nerurkar is a Harvard brain expert and stress special
item.description: By @steven: So many of us can’t stop scrolling and most of us don’t understand why… To help understand why, I’m joined by two experts who break down exactly what short-form content is doing to our brains. Dr Aditi Nerurkar is a Harvard brain expert and stress special
